docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY SEDLACK, MOLLY AS TO DEFENDANT MORTON, STEWART ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE $0.00) SERVED JUL-13-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORTON, STEWART

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEDLACK, MOLLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORTON, STEWART $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,030.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-21-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-21-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MOLLY SEDLACK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STEWART MORTON IS PRESENT. UNFILED PROOF OF SERVICE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT IS UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
